segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: How did the woman get help?

translations.zh-Hans: 这名女子是怎样获得救援的？

segments.text: When a light passenger plane flew off course some time ago, it crashed in the mountains and its pilot was killed.

translations.zh-Hans: 不久前，一架轻型客机偏离航线，撞上山区，飞行员遇难。

segments.text: The only passengers, a young woman and her two baby daughters, were unhurt.

translations.zh-Hans: 机上仅有的乘客——一名年轻女子和她的两个幼女——都安然无恙。

segments.text: It was the middle of winter.
Snow lay thick on the ground.
The woman knew that the nearest village was miles away.

translations.zh-Hans: 这名女子知道，最近的村庄也在数英里之外。

segments.text: When it grew dark, she turned a suitcase into a bed and put the children inside it, covering them with all the clothes she could find.

translations.zh-Hans: 天黑后，她把一只手提箱改成小床，把孩子放进去，再用能找到的所有衣物盖住她们。

segments.text: During the night, it got terribly cold.

translations.zh-Hans: 夜间天气变得异常寒冷。

segments.text: The woman kept as near as she could to the children and even tried to get into the case herself, but it was too small.

translations.zh-Hans: 她尽量紧挨着孩子们，甚至试图自己也钻进箱子，但箱子太小了。

segments.text: Early next morning, she heard planes passing overhead and wondered how she could send a signal.

translations.zh-Hans: 第二天一早，她听见飞机从头顶飞过，便琢磨如何发出信号。
随后她想出了一个办法。

segments.text: She stamped out the letters SOS in the snow.

translations.zh-Hans: 她在雪地上踩出了“SOS”三个字母。

segments.text: Fortunately, a pilot saw the signal and sent a message by radio to the nearest town.

translations.zh-Hans: 幸运的是，一名飞行员看见了信号，并通过无线电向最近的城镇发去消息。

segments.text: It was not long before a helicopter arrived on the scene to rescue the survivors of the plane crash.

translations.zh-Hans: 没过多久，一架直升机便赶到现场，营救这场空难中的幸存者。
